sqlMap.select: SELECT B.GUBUN, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, A.WRITEDATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.WRITERNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, A.CONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM AS A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO AS B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = ( SELECT BOARD_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PORTLET_ID = #portletId# ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = B.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC LIMIT #startRow#, #listCount#

SELECT A.ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , ENDDATE, POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 , IFNULL(B.RESULT, 0) Result, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_ps_lightpollresult WHERE itemSeq = A.ITEMSEQ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) as count FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL A LEFT JOIN TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMSEQ = B.ITEMSEQ AND USERID = #userId# WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND STARTDATE <= DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ENDDATE >= DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY A.ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT result, COUNT(RESULT) AS count FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY COUNT DESC, RESULT ASC

SELECT LOGO_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_LOGO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LOGO_TYPE = #logoType#
AND company_id = #companyId#
SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_portal_menu_user WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND user_id = #userId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_portal_menu_user ( user_id, tenant_id, company_id, menu_id, menu_order) VALUES ( #userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #menuId#, #order# )
sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO tbl_portal_menu_user ( user_id, tenant_id, company_id, menu_id, menu_order ) VALUES ( #userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #menuId#, #order# ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE menu_order = #order#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_portal_menu_user WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND user_id = #userId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT Q.quicklinkid, user_type, ACL.view_flag as viewflag FROM tbl_ps_quicklink as Q
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct quicklinkid, MAX(view_flag) AS view_flag, user_type, tenant_id FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE ( (accessid = #userId# AND user_type = 'USER' AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) OR ( accessid IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL G ON G.accessid = F.group_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #userId# AND F.member_type = 'USER' AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 'GROUP' ) ) GROUP BY quicklinkid, user_type, tenant_id ) ACL
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT quicklinkid, MAX(view_flag) AS view_flag, user_type, tenant_id FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE ( (accessid in (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 'JIKWI' AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) OR (accessid in (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) OR ( accessid IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL G ON G.accessid = F.group_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND ( (F.member_id in (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKWI') OR (F.member_id in (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKCHEK') ) AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 'GROUP' ) ) GROUP BY quicklinkid, user_type, tenant_id ) ACL
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct quicklinkid, MAX(view_flag) AS view_flag, user_type, tenant_id FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE ( (accessid = #deptId# AND user_type = 'DEPT' AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
and SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 'Y'
) OR ( accessid IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL G ON G.accessid = F.group_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_type = 'DEPT' AND F.member_id = #deptId# AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId#
AND F.sub_dept_yn = 'Y'
) AND user_type = 'GROUP' ) ) GROUP BY quicklinkid, user_type, tenant_id ) ACL
ON ACL.quicklinkid = Q.quicklinkid AND ACL.tenant_id = Q.tenant_id WHERE Q.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ACL.view_flag IS NOT NULL

SELECT quicklinkid, quicklinkname, quicklinkname2, quicklinkname3, quicklinkname6, linktype, linktypeurl, url, size_ as quicksize FROM tbl_ps_quicklink WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND quicklinkid in
#quickLinkIdList[]#
AND quicklinkid = ''
ORDER BY LINKORDER ASC
LIMIT #limit# OFFSET #offset#

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT Q.quicklinkid FROM tbl_ps_quicklink as Q WHERE Q.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND Q.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND quicklinkid in
#quickLinkIdList[]#
AND quicklinkid = ''
) acl

SELECT theme_id as themeId, frame_id as frameId, frame_used as frameUsed, frame_default as frameDefault, used_frame as usedFrame FROM tbl_portal_frame_comp as fcomp JOIN tbl_portal_theme_user as tuser ON fcomp.tenant_id = tuser.tenant_id AND fcomp.company_id = tuser.company_id AND fcomp.theme_id = tuser.used_theme AND tuser.is_default = 1 WHERE fcomp.company_id = #companyId# AND fcomp.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND tuser.user_id = #userId# AND fcomp.frame_used = 1

SELECT fcomp.theme_id as themeId, fcomp.frame_id as frameId, fcomp.frame_used as frameUsed, fcomp.frame_default as frameDefault FROM tbl_portal_frame_comp as fcomp JOIN tbl_portal_theme_comp as tcomp ON fcomp.tenant_id = tcomp.tenant_id AND fcomp.company_id = tcomp.company_id AND fcomp.theme_id = tcomp.theme_id WHERE fcomp.company_id = #companyId# AND fcomp.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND tcomp.theme_default = 1 AND fcomp.frame_used = 1
sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO tbl_portal_theme_user(USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USED_THEME, USED_FRAME, is_default, USEPAGING) VALUES (#userId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #themeId#, #frameId#, #isDefault#, #usePaging#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USED_FRAME = #frameId#, USEPAGING = #usePaging#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_portal_portlet_user WHERE user_id = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ( user_id, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_id, portlet_order, menu_id, portlet_used, theme_id ) VALUES ( #userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletOrder#, (SELECT MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLET_ID = #portletId#), #portletUsed#, #themeId# ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE portlet_used = #portletUsed#, portlet_order = #portletOrder#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.START_DATE <= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND
(
( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND ( B.USER_ID = #companyId# OR B.USER_ID = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) ) ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) )
( A.COMPANYID = #companyId# OR B.USER_ID = #deptId# OR B.USER_ID = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) )
) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT QST_ID, VOTES_NUM, CONTENT FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qstId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, B.FILEPATH, B.ADDTHUMBNAIL, B.THUMBNAILEXT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'y' AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# ORDER BY A.DOCNO DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #photoCount#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
SELECT READ_FG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BOARDID = #boardId# AND ACCESSID = #accessId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuId, NAME.menu_name AS menuName, IFNULL((SELECT menu_order FROM tbl_portal_menu_user AS USER WHERE USER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND USER.company_id = #companyId# AND USER.menu_id = A.menu_id AND USER.user_id = #userId#), IFNULL(COMP.company_order, A.default_order)) AS menuOrder, AUTH.access_yn AS accessYN, COMP.menu_used AS menuUsed, COMP.company_lang AS companyLang, A.menu_url AS menuUrl, A.icon_urL AS iconUrl, COMP.company_order AS companyOrder, A.menucode, COMP.OPENTYPE, A.menu_type as menuType FROM tbl_portal_menu AS A JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY menu_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN menu_lang = #langType# THEN 0 WHEN menu_lang = #primaryLang# THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ) AS rn FROM tbl_portal_menu_name WHERE menu_lang IN (#langType#, #primaryLang#, 1) AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) AS NAME ON A.menu_id = NAME.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP AS COMP ON NAME.tenant_id = COMP.tenant_id AND NAME.company_id = COMP.company_id AND A.menu_id = COMP.menu_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, menu_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 1 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_menu_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #userId# AND F.member_type = 'USER' AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY menu_id ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, menu_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 2 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 3 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_menu_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND ( (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKWI') OR (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKCHEK') ) AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY menu_id ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, menu_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #deptId# AND user_type = 0 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
and SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 'Y'
) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_menu_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #deptId# AND F.member_type = 'DEPT'
AND F.sub_dept_yn = 'Y'
AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY menu_id ) AUTH
ON COMP.tenant_id = AUTH.tenant_id AND COMP.company_id = AUTH.company_id AND A.menu_id = AUTH.menu_id WHERE NAME.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND NAME.company_id = #companyId# AND COMP.menu_used = 1 AND (AUTH.access_yn IS NOT NULL)
AND A.MENU_TYPE IN ('MA', 'MG')
AND A.MENU_TYPE IN ('A', 'G')
ORDER BY menuOrder

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, B.PORTLET_ORDER, C.PORTLET_NAME, A.PORTLET_URL, IF(A.PORTLET_TYPE = 'G' OR A.PORTLET_TYPE = 'MG', 1, 0) AS IS_GENERAL, A.DEFAULT_ORDER, B.PORTLET_CATEGORY, B.CONNECTION_URL, B.PORTLET_USED AS PORTLET_USED, B.BOARD_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME C ON B.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID AND B.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID AND B.COMPANY_ID = C.COMPANY_ID AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PORTLET_ID = #portletId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ( USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_ORDER, MENU_ID ) VALUES ( #userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletOrder#, (SELECT MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLET_ID = #portletId#) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS USER_NAME, CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DESCRIPTION2 ELSE DESCRIPTION END AS DEPT_NAME, BIRTH, IF(BIRTHTYPE = 'Y', 1, 0) AS IS_SOLAR, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TITLE2 ELSE TITLE END AS TITLE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ( (BIRTH LIKE CONCAT('%-', #month#, '-%') AND BIRTHTYPE = 'Y') OR (BIRTH <> '' AND BIRTHTYPE = 'N') ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND CN NOT IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION ALL SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = 'retirees' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )

SELECT IFNULL(CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME END, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END) AS USER_NAME, IFNULL(CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.TITLE2 ELSE A.TITLE END, ' ') AS TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END AS DEPT_NAME, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, A.CN FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE TERM = #yearAndMonth# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#

SELECT A.theme_id,
A.theme_name, A.theme_content AS theme_content,
A.theme_name2 AS theme_name, A.theme_content2 AS theme_content,
A.theme_name3 AS theme_name, A.theme_content3 AS theme_content,
A.theme_name2 AS theme_name, A.theme_content4 AS theme_content,
A.theme_name2 AS theme_name, A.theme_content4 AS theme_content,
A.theme_name2 AS theme_name, A.theme_content4 AS theme_content,
ifnull(D.is_default, 0) as theme_used, B.theme_default, C.frame_id as frame_default, access_yn AS accessYN FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP C ON B.theme_id = C.theme_id AND C.company_id = #companyId# AND C.tenant_id = #tenantId# LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER D ON A.theme_id = D.used_theme AND D.user_id = #userId# AND D.company_id = #companyId# AND D.tenant_id = #tenantId#
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, theme_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 1 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_theme_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #userId# AND F.member_type = 'USER' AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY theme_id ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, theme_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 2 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 3 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_theme_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND ( (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKWI') OR (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKCHEK') ) AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY theme_id ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, theme_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 0 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
and SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 'Y'
) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_theme_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #userId# AND F.member_type = 'DEPT'
AND F.sub_dept_yn = 'Y'
AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY theme_id ) AUTH
ON B.company_id = AUTH.company_id AND B.tenant_id = AUTH.tenant_id AND A.theme_id = AUTH.theme_id WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.theme_used = 1 AND C.frame_default = 1 AND AUTH.access_yn is not null

SELECT A.theme_id,
A.theme_name, A.theme_content AS theme_content,
A.theme_name2 AS theme_name, A.theme_content2 AS theme_content,
A.theme_name3 AS theme_name, A.theme_content3 AS theme_content,
A.theme_name2 AS theme_name, A.theme_content4 AS theme_content,
1 as theme_used, B.theme_default, C.frame_id as frame_default, 1 AS accessYN FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP C ON B.theme_id = C.theme_id AND C.company_id = #companyId# AND C.tenant_id = #tenantId# WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.theme_used = 1 AND C.frame_default = 1 and B.THEME_DEFAULT = 1 limit 1

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, B.menu_url AS menuurl FROM TBL_PORTAL_STARTPAGE A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id WHERE A.user_id = #userId# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_STARTPAGE SET menu_id = #menuId# WHERE user_id = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE user_id = #userId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET is_default = CASE WHEN used_theme = #usedTheme# THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE user_id = #userId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.startdate, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.CONTENT, C.GUBUN, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.BOARDID = C.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = C.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(C.COMPANYID) = '' OR C.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL)
(TOPWRITERID = #userId# OR WRITERID = #userId#)
AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
ORDER BY A.DOCNO DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #itemCount#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.BOARDID = C.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = C.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(C.COMPANYID) = '' OR C.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL)
(TOPWRITERID = #userId# OR WRITERID = #userId#)
AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)

SELECT DOCINFO.docid, CASE WHEN (LINEINFO.APRSTATE = '002' AND LINEINFO.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE DOCINFO.DOCSTATE END AS docstate, CASE WHEN (LINEINFO.APRSTATE = '000' and DOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE DOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS functiontype, DOCINFO.doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(DOCINFO.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DOCINFO.writerid, DOCINFO.writername, DOCINFO.writername2, DOCINFO.href, DOCINFO.companyid, LINEINFO.aprmemberdeptid, LINEINFO.aprmemberdeptname, LINEINFO.aprmemberid, LINEINFO.aprmembername, DOCINFO.hasattachyn, DOCINFO.hasopinionyn, exp.formname, exp.formname2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON DOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND DOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND DOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.tenant_id = LINEINFO.tenant_id AND DOCINFO.companyid = LINEINFO.companyid AND DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO exp ON DOCINFO.DOCID = exp.DOCID AND DOCINFO.TENANT_ID = exp.TENANT_ID AND DOCINFO.COMPANYID = exp.COMPANYID WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId#
AND (LINEINFO.aprmemberid in
#userIDs[]#
OR ( LINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND LINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND LINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE = #proxyList[].title# )
) AND DOCINFO.functiontype = '002' AND LINEINFO.aprstate = '002' AND DOCINFO.docstate not in ('015') AND DOCINFO.startdate between date_sub(now(), interval 1 YEAR) and now() AND IFNULL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 ORDER BY DOCINFO.startdate DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT LINEINFO.aprmembersn AS aprmembersn, LINEINFO.aprstate AS aprstate, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN CODEINFO.NAME2 WHEN '3' THEN CODEINFO.NAME3 WHEN '4' THEN CODEINFO.NAME4 ELSE CODEINFO.NAME END AS ext1, CODEINFO.name2 AS name2, CODEINFO.name3 AS name3, CODEINFO.name4 AS name4, LINEINFO.aprmemberid AS aprmemberid, LINEINFO.aprmembername AS aprmembername, LINEINFO.aprmembername2 AS aprmembername2, USER.extensionattribute2 AS ext2, LINEINFO.aprtype, LINEINFO.aprmemberdeptname AS aprmemberdeptname, LINEINFO.aprmemberdeptname2 AS aprmemberdeptname2, LINEINFO.aprmemberjobtitle AS aprmemberjobtitle, LINEINFO.aprmemberjobtitle2 AS aprmemberjobtitle2, LINEINFO.processdate AS processdate FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO JOIN TBL_CODELIST AS CODEINFO ON LINEINFO.tenant_id = CODEINFO.tenant_id AND LINEINFO.companyid = CODEINFO.companyid AND LINEINFO.aprstate = CODEINFO.code2 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER AS USER ON LINEINFO.tenant_id = USER.tenant_id AND LINEINFO.companyid = USER.physicaldeliveryofficename AND LINEINFO.aprmemberid = USER.cn WHERE LINEINFO.docid = #docId# AND LINEINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND LINEINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND CODEINFO.code1 = #code1#

SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = '002' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE END AS docstate, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = '000' and TBL_APRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE TBL_APRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS functiontype, doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, writerid, writername, writername2, href, TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND aprmemberid = #userId# AND functiontype = '004' AND startdate between date_sub(now(), interval 1 YEAR) and now() AND IFNULL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = 1 ORDER BY startdate DESC LIMIT 7

SELECT DOCINFO.docid, CASE WHEN (LINEINFO.APRSTATE = '002' AND LINEINFO.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE DOCINFO.DOCSTATE END AS docstate, CASE WHEN (LINEINFO.APRSTATE = '000' and DOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE DOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS functiontype, DOCINFO.doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(DOCINFO.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DOCINFO.writerid, DOCINFO.writername, DOCINFO.writername2, DOCINFO.href, DOCINFO.companyid, DOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, DOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, exp.formname, exp.formname2, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE DOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME END AS WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2 ELSE DOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE END AS WRITERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.tenant_id = LINEINFO.tenant_id AND DOCINFO.companyid = LINEINFO.companyid AND DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON DOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND DOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND DOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO exp ON DOCINFO.DOCID = exp.DOCID AND DOCINFO.TENANT_ID = exp.TENANT_ID WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND LINEINFO.aprmemberid = #userId# AND LINEINFO.aprmembersn = 1 AND LINEINFO.aprtype <>'015' AND DOCINFO.docstate <> '017' AND DOCINFO.functiontype <> '004' AND DOCINFO.startdate between date_sub(now(), interval 1 YEAR) and now() AND IFNULL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT 7

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCINFO.docid) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.tenant_id = LINEINFO.tenant_id AND DOCINFO.companyid = LINEINFO.companyid AND DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON DOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND DOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND DOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND (LINEINFO.aprmemberid in
#userIDs[]#
OR ( LINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #proxyList[].id# AND LINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID = #proxyList[].dept# AND LINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE = #proxyList[].title# )
) AND DOCINFO.functiontype in ('002', '005', '006', '015') AND LINEINFO.aprstate in ('002', '005', '006', '015') AND DOCINFO.docstate not in ('015') AND DOCINFO.startdate between date_sub(now(), interval 1 YEAR) and now() AND IFNULL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1 ORDER BY DOCINFO.startdate DESC

SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* FROM TBL_FORMINFO INNER JOIN TBL_FORMUSERINFO ON TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.companyid AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.formid LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = O.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = O.TENANT_ID AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = O.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_FORMUSERINFO.USERID = #userId# AND TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID IN ( SELECT FORMCONTID FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND FORMCONTUSERDEPID = #deptId# UNION ALL SELECT FORMCONTID FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND (FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL' or FORMCONTOWNDEPID = #deptId#) ) AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID = #companyId# ORDER BY FORMORDER LIMIT 0, 6

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -6 HOUR))=1 THEN 1 END) AS hour, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -6 HOUR) > DOCINFO.STARTDATE)=1 THEN 1 END) AS day, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -1 WEEK) AND DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) > DOCINFO.STARTDATE)=1 THEN 1 END) AS week, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH) AND DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -1 WEEK) > DOCINFO.STARTDATE)=1 THEN 1 END) AS month, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH) > DOCINFO.startdate)=1 THEN 1 END) AS other FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND LINEINFO.aprmemberid = #userId# AND DOCINFO.functiontype = '002' AND LINEINFO.aprstate = '002' AND DOCINFO.docstate not in ('015')

SELECT A.portlet_id AS portletId, A.menu_id AS menuId, NAME.portlet_name AS portletName, COMP.board_id AS boardId, IFNULL(COMP.connection_url, A.portlet_url) AS portletUrl, IFNULL(USER.portlet_order, IFNULL(THEME.portlet_order, IFNULL(COMP.portlet_used, A.default_order))) AS portletOrder, IFNULL(USER.portlet_used, IFNULL(THEME.portlet_used, IFNULL(COMP.portlet_used, 1))) AS portletUsed, THEME.is_fixed as isFixed, A.portletcode, MENU.menucode, CS.CLASS_SIZE_RESULT AS classSize, COMP.connection_id as portletConnectionId
AUTH.access_yn AS accessYN
CASE WHEN A.menu_Id = 0 THEN IFNULL(AUTH.access_yn, 1) ELSE AUTH.access_yn END AS accessYN
FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET AS A JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY portlet_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN portlet_lang= #portletLang# THEN 0 WHEN portlet_lang= #primaryLang# THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ) AS rn FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_lang IN (#portletLang#, 1) ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) AS NAME ON A.portlet_id = NAME.portlet_id AND A.menu_id = NAME.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU AS MENU ON A.menu_id = MENU.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET AS THEME ON NAME.tenant_id = THEME.tenant_id AND NAME.company_id = THEME.company_id AND A.portlet_id = THEME.portlet_id AND A.menu_id = THEME.menu_id AND THEME.theme_id = #themeId# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP AS COMP ON NAME.tenant_id = COMP.tenant_id AND NAME.company_id = COMP.company_id AND A.portlet_id = COMP.portlet_id AND A.menu_id = COMP.menu_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 1 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #userId# AND F.member_type = 'USER' AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM tbl_portal_portlet_auth WHERE ( (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 2 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 3 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_portlet_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND ( (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKWI') OR (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKCHEK') ) AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM tbl_portal_portlet_auth WHERE ( (user_id = #deptId# AND user_type = 0 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
and SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 'Y'
) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_portlet_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #deptId# AND F.member_type = 'DEPT'
AND F.sub_dept_yn = 'Y'
AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type ) AUTH
ON COMP.tenant_id = AUTH.tenant_id AND COMP.company_id = AUTH.company_id AND A.portlet_id = AUTH.portlet_id LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER AS USER ON COMP.tenant_id = USER.tenant_id AND COMP.company_id = USER.company_id AND COMP.portlet_id = USER.portlet_id AND USER.user_id = #userId# AND USER.theme_id = #themeId# LEFT JOIN (SELECT PCS.*, NVL(PUS.CLASS_SIZE, PCS.CLASS_SIZE) AS CLASS_SIZE_RESULT FROM (SELECT CS.*, PS.CLASS_SIZE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE CS JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PS ON CS.SIZE_ID = PS.SIZE_ID WHERE DEFAULT_FLAG = TRUE) PCS LEFT JOIN (SELECT US.*, PS.CLASS_SIZE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER_SIZE US JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PS ON PS.SIZE_ID = US.SIZE_ID AND US.USER_ID = #userId#) PUS ON PCS.TENANT_ID = PUS.TENANT_ID AND PCS.COMPANY_ID = PUS.COMPANY_ID AND PCS.THEME_ID = PUS.THEME_ID AND PCS.PORTLET_ID = PUS.PORTLET_ID WHERE PCS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PCS.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND PCS.THEME_ID = #themeId#) AS CS ON COMP.TENANT_ID = CS.TENANT_ID AND COMP.COMPANY_ID = CS.COMPANY_ID AND COMP.PORTLET_ID = CS.PORTLET_ID WHERE NAME.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND NAME.company_id = #companyId# AND (COMP.portlet_used = 1 && THEME.portlet_used = 1) AND (AUTH.access_yn IS NOT NULL)
ON COMP.tenant_id = AUTH.tenant_id AND COMP.company_id = AUTH.company_id AND A.portlet_id = AUTH.portlet_id LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER AS USER ON COMP.tenant_id = USER.tenant_id AND COMP.company_id = USER.company_id AND COMP.portlet_id = USER.portlet_id AND USER.user_id = #userId# AND USER.theme_id = #themeId# LEFT JOIN (SELECT PCS.*, NVL(PUS.CLASS_SIZE, PCS.CLASS_SIZE) AS CLASS_SIZE_RESULT FROM (SELECT CS.*, PS.CLASS_SIZE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE CS JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PS ON CS.SIZE_ID = PS.SIZE_ID WHERE DEFAULT_FLAG = TRUE) PCS LEFT JOIN (SELECT US.*, PS.CLASS_SIZE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER_SIZE US JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PS ON PS.SIZE_ID = US.SIZE_ID AND US.USER_ID = #userId#) PUS ON PCS.TENANT_ID = PUS.TENANT_ID AND PCS.COMPANY_ID = PUS.COMPANY_ID AND PCS.THEME_ID = PUS.THEME_ID AND PCS.PORTLET_ID = PUS.PORTLET_ID WHERE PCS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PCS.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND PCS.THEME_ID = #themeId#) AS CS ON COMP.TENANT_ID = CS.TENANT_ID AND COMP.COMPANY_ID = CS.COMPANY_ID AND COMP.PORTLET_ID = CS.PORTLET_ID WHERE NAME.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND NAME.company_id = #companyId# AND (COMP.portlet_used = 1 && THEME.portlet_used = 1) AND (AUTH.access_yn IS NOT NULL)
(USER.portlet_used = 1 OR USER.portlet_used IS NULL OR THEME.is_fixed = 1)
ORDER BY portletOrder

SELECT IFNULL(USER.used_theme, theme_id) AS themeId FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP AS COMP LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER AS USER ON COMP.tenant_id = USER.tenant_id AND COMP.company_id = USER.company_id AND USER.user_id = #userId# AND USER.is_default = 1 WHERE COMP.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND COMP.company_id = #companyId# AND COMP.theme_default = 1 AND COMP.theme_used = 1

SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid,
B.theme_name AS themename, B.theme_content AS themecontent,
B.theme_name2 AS themename, B.theme_content2 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name3 AS themename, B.theme_content3 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name4 AS themename, B.theme_content4 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name5 AS themename, B.theme_content5 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name6 AS themename, B.theme_content6 AS themecontent,
A.theme_used AS themeused, A.theme_default AS themedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#

SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USED_THEME, B.FRAME_NAME AS USED_FRAME, A.USEPAGING FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.USED_FRAME = B.FRAME_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.is_default = 1
AND A.used_theme = #usedTheme#

select.isEmpty: SELECT #userId# AS USER_ID, THEME_ID AS USED_THEME, (SELECT B.FRAME_NAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.FRAME_ID = B.FRAME_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.FRAME_DEFAULT = 1 AND A.THEME_ID = (SELECT THEME_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_DEFAULT = 1)) AS USED_FRAME, 1 AS USEPAGING FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_DEFAULT = 1 LIMIT 1
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT #userId# AS USER_ID, THEME_ID AS USED_THEME, (SELECT B.FRAME_NAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.FRAME_ID = B.FRAME_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.FRAME_DEFAULT = 1 AND A.THEME_ID = (SELECT THEME_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_ID = #themeId#)) AS USED_FRAME, 1 AS USEPAGING FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_ID = #themeId# LIMIT 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERNAME2, DATE_ADD(A.STARTDATE, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as STARTDATE, A.TITLE, C.GUBUN, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, BOARDNAME3, BOARDNAME4, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (COMPANYID = #companyId# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userId# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND S.USERID = #userId# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) ) ) JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.BOARDID = C.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = C.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(C.COMPANYID) = '' OR C.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, BOARDNAME3, BOARDNAME4, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (COMPANYID = #companyId# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userId# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND S.USERID = #userId# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) ) ) JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.BOARDID = C.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = C.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(C.COMPANYID) = '' OR C.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL)

SELECT A.TITLE, A.WRITERNAME, DATE_ADD(A.STARTDATE, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as STARTDATE, A.ITEMID, A.BOARDID, B.GUBUN, A.WRITERNAME2, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = B.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = B.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND
A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT SUBSTR(CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END, 1, 18) AS C_CLUBNAME, A.C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_REALUSERCNT AS C_MEMBERCNT, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT CU.C_CLUBNO, IFNULL(COUNT(CU.C_ID), 0) AS C_REALUSERCNT, CU.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER CU INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER UM ON RTRIM(UM.CN) = RTRIM(CU.C_ID) AND CU.TENANT_ID = UM.TENANT_ID WHERE PERMIT <> 0 AND CU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY CU.C_CLUBNO, CU.TENANT_ID) REALCNT ON A.C_CLUBNO = REALCNT.C_CLUBNO AND A.TENANT_ID = REALCNT.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY C_REALUSERCNT DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT CU.C_CLUBNO, IFNULL(COUNT(CU.C_ID), 0) AS C_REALUSERCNT, CU.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER CU INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER UM ON RTRIM(UM.CN) = RTRIM(CU.C_ID) AND CU.TENANT_ID = UM.TENANT_ID WHERE PERMIT <> 0 AND CU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY CU.C_CLUBNO, CU.TENANT_ID) REALCNT ON A.C_CLUBNO = REALCNT.C_CLUBNO AND A.TENANT_ID = REALCNT.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT c_id, permit FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #clubNo# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, A.PORTLET_CATEGORY, IF(C.PORTLET_TYPE = 'G' OR C.PORTLET_TYPE = 'MG', 1, 0) AS IS_GENERAL, C.portlet_url as connection_url, A.PORTLET_ORDER, A.PORTLET_USED AS PORTLET_USED, C.MENU_ID, C.DEFAULT_ORDER, C.PORTLET_URL, A.BOARD_ID, CASE #menuLang# WHEN 2 THEN D.BOARDNAME2 WHEN 3 THEN D.BOARDNAME3 WHEN 4 THEN D.BOARDNAME4 ELSE D.BOARDNAME END AS BOARDNAME, E.MENU_NAME, F.PORTLET_NAME, C.PORTLETCODE, G.MENUCODE, H.CODE AS SYSTEMCONFIG_CODE, H.DESCRIPTION AS SYSTEMCONFIG_DESCRIPTION, IFNULL(D.GUBUN, -1) AS BOARDGUBUN FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET C ON A.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU G ON C.MENU_ID = G.MENU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO D ON A.BOARD_ID = D.BOARDID AND (A.COMPANY_ID = D.COMPANYID OR TRIM(D.COMPANYID) = '' OR D.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MENU_NAME, menu_id FROM ( SELECT MENU_NAME, menu_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY menu_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN menu_lang = #menuLang# THEN 0 WHEN menu_lang = #primaryLang# THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ) AS rn FROM tbl_portal_menu_name WHERE menu_lang IN (#menuLang#, #primaryLang#, 1) AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) E ON A.menu_id = E.menu_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_NAME FROM ( SELECT PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_NAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY portlet_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN portlet_lang= #menuLang# THEN 0 WHEN portlet_lang= #primaryLang# THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ) AS rn FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME WHERE portlet_lang IN (#menuLang#, #primaryLang#, 1) AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) F ON A.PORTLET_ID = F.PORTLET_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG H ON A.connection_id = H.CODE AND A.TENANT_ID = H.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = H.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND C.portlet_type <> 'MG' AND C.portlet_type <> 'MA'
AND C.portlet_type <> 'G' AND C.portlet_type <> 'A'
ORDER BY A.portlet_order

SELECT B.portlet_lang, B.portlet_name, A.portlet_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.portlet_id = B.portlet_id WHERE A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.portlet_id = #portletId#
AND B.portlet_lang in ('1' , '2' , '3'
, '4'
, '5'
, '6'
)
SELECT DISTINCT PRIMARYLANG FROM TBL_WEATHER
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM tbl_tenant_config WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'weatherKey' LIMIT 0,#size#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEATHER SET CURRENTWEATHER = #currentWeather# WHERE CITYCODE = #cityCode#
UPDATE TBL_WEATHER SET TODAYWEATHER = #todayWeather# WHERE CITYCODE = #cityCode#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.SN, A.CITYCODE, A.CITYNAME, B.DISPLAYCITYNAME, A.PRIMARYLANG, A.CURRENTWEATHER, A.TODAYWEATHER FROM TBL_WEATHER AS A JOIN TBL_WEATHER_CITY AS B ON A.CITYCODE = B.CITYCODE WHERE A.PRIMARYLANG = #countryCode# AND B.USERLOCALLANG = #primaryLang# AND
A.SN = '1'
A.CITYCODE = #cityCode#

SELECT A.SN, A.CITYCODE, A.CITYNAME, B.DISPLAYCITYNAME, A.PRIMARYLANG, A.CURRENTWEATHER, A.TODAYWEATHER FROM TBL_WEATHER AS A JOIN TBL_WEATHER_CITY AS B ON A.CITYCODE = B.CITYCODE WHERE A.PRIMARYLANG = #countryCode# AND B.USERLOCALLANG = #primaryLang# ORDER BY SN asc
SELECT CITYCODE FROM TBL_WEATHER_USER WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_WEATHER_USER (USERID, TENANT_ID, CITYCODE, COUNTRYCODE) VALUES (#userId#, #tenantId#, #cityCode#, #countryCode#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CITYCODE = #cityCode#, COUNTRYCODE = #countryCode#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ACCESS_YN as accessYN FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE MENU_ID = #menuId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = #userType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
SELECT ACCESS_YN as accessYN FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE MENU_ID = #menuId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = #userType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#

SELECT ACCESS_YN as accessYN FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE MENU_ID = #menuId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = #userType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID=COMPANY_ID

SELECT comp.MENU_ID AS MENUID, name.MENU_NAME AS MENUNAME, comp.MENU_USED AS MENUUSED, comp.COMPANY_LANG AS COMPANYLANG, main.MENU_URL AS MENUURL, main.ICON_URL AS ICONURL, comp.company_order AS COMPANYORDER, main.menucode AS MENUCODE FROM tbl_portal_menu_comp as comp JOIN tbl_portal_menu as main ON comp.MENU_ID = main.MENU_ID JOIN tbl_portal_menu_name as name ON comp.MENU_ID = name.MENU_ID AND comp.COMPANY_ID = name.COMPANY_ID AND comp.TENANT_ID = name.TENANT_ID AND comp.COMPANY_LANG = name.MENU_LANG WHERE comp.MENU_USED = 1 AND comp.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND comp.COMPANY_LANG = #langType# AND comp.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY company_order asc
sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ( user_id, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_id, portlet_order, menu_id, portlet_used, theme_id ) VALUES ( #userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletOrder#, (SELECT MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLET_ID = #portletId#), 1, #themeId# ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE portlet_order = #portletOrder#, portlet_used = #portletUsed#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT portlet_id as portletid FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER WHERE user_id = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#portletIdList[]#

SELECT auth.access_YN FROM tbl_portal_menu_comp as comp JOIN tbl_portal_menu as menu ON comp.menu_id = menu.menu_id JOIN tbl_portal_menu_auth as auth ON comp.tenant_id = auth.tenant_id AND comp.company_id = auth.company_id AND comp.menu_id = auth.menu_id AND comp.menu_used = 1 AND comp.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND comp.company_id = #companyId# AND menu.menucode = 'workspace' AND user_id = #userId#
AND
menu_type = 'A'
menu_type = 'MA'

SELECT A.cn, A.tenant_id AS tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET B ON A.cn = B.company_id WHERE A.cn = A.dept_cd_path AND B.company_id IS NULL AND A.cn NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'

SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, TYPE_ID, DOWN_COUNT, FILE_EXT, FOLDER_ID, USE_STATUS, CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC, FILE_ID DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #folderListCount#

SELECT A.portlet_id AS portletId, AUTH.access_yn AS accessYN FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP B ON A.portlet_id = B.portlet_id AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId#
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 1 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_portlet_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #userId# AND F.member_type = 'USER' AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 2 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND user_type = 3 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_portlet_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND ( (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKWI') OR (F.member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND member_type = 'JIKCHEK') ) AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type ) AUTH
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(access_yn) AS access_yn, portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE ( (user_id = #deptId# AND user_type = 0 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
and SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 'Y'
) OR (user_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo F JOIN tbl_portal_portlet_auth G ON G.user_id = F.group_id AND G.company_id = F.company_id AND G.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND F.member_id = #deptId# AND F.member_type = 'DEPT'
AND F.sub_dept_yn = 'Y'
AND F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.company_id = #companyId# ) AND user_type = 4 ) ) GROUP BY portlet_id, tenant_id, company_id, user_type ) AUTH
ON B.tenant_id = AUTH.tenant_id AND B.company_id = AUTH.company_id AND B.portlet_id = AUTH.portlet_id WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.portlet_used = 1 AND AUTH.access_yn is not null

SELECT A.cn, A.tenant_id AS tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH B ON A.cn = B.company_id WHERE A.cn = A.dept_cd_path AND B.company_id IS NULL AND A.cn NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'

SELECT A.cn, A.tenant_id AS tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH B ON A.cn = B.company_id WHERE A.cn = A.dept_cd_path AND B.company_id IS NULL AND A.cn NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
SELECT board_id FROM tbl_portal_portlet_comp WHERE portlet_id = 2 AND menu_id = 4 AND company_id = #v_companyID# AND tenant_id = #v_tenantID#

SELECT CS.PORTLET_ID AS portletId, PS.CLASS_SIZE AS classSize FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE CS JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PS ON CS.SIZE_ID = PS.SIZE_ID WHERE CS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CS.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND CS.THEME_ID = #themeId# ORDER BY PORTLET_ID, CLASS_SIZE
sqlMap.update: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER_SIZE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND THEME_ID = #themeId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER_SIZE (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, THEME_ID, SIZE_ID) VALUES
( #[].userId#, #[].tenantId#, #[].companyId#, #[].portletId#, #[].themeId#, (SELECT SIZE_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE WHERE CLASS_SIZE = #[].classSize# LIMIT 1) )

INSERT INTO tbl_portal_top_user (user_id, tenant_id, company_id, type) VALUES (#userID#, #tenantID#, #companyID#, #type#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = #userID#, tenant_id = #tenantID#, company_id = #companyID#, type=#type#
sqlMap.select: SELECT user_id as userID, tenant_id as tenantID, company_id as companyID, type as type FROM tbl_portal_top_user WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND company_id = #companyID# AND user_id = #userID#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.STARTDATE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.CONTENT, A.READCOUNT, '0' AS ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, A.extensionAttribute2 FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY))) ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.cn, A.tenant_id AS tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_TOP_COMPANY B ON A.cn = B.company_id WHERE A.cn = A.dept_cd_path AND B.company_id IS NULL AND A.cn NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT docid, docstate, functiontype, doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, writerid, writername, writername2, href, companyid FROM vgongramaprdoingdoclist WHERE APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT 7

SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TENANT_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TYPECODE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CODE = B.CONNECTION_ID WHERE B.PORTLET_ID = #portletId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
SELECT USECOLOR FROM TBL_PORTAL_TOP_USER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND company_id = #companyID# AND user_id = #userID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_portal_top_user (user_id, tenant_id, company_id, USECOLOR) VALUES (#userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #useColor#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = #userId#, tenant_id = #tenantId#, company_id = #companyId#, USECOLOR = #useColor#
sqlMap.select: SELECT PORTLET_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLETCODE = 'resource'
SELECT COUNTRYCODE FROM TBL_WEATHER_USER WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT LANG FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT CITYCODE FROM TBL_WEATHER WHERE SN = 1 AND PRIMARYLANG = #countryCode#
